{"body":" Hi GO,

I would need a bunch of GO terms for a paper published two weeks ago in Cell (PMID: 40840445) that describes detoxification of modified adenosines by ADAL and ADK.

Thanks

Sylvain

1)
N6-methyladenosine kinase activity
Catalysis of the reaction: ATP + N6-methyladenosine = ADP + H+ + N6-methyl-AMP 
child of: GO:0019206 nucleoside kinase activity
Xref: Rhea:86211 (not yet public)

2)
N6,N6-dimethyladenosine kinase activity
Catalysis of the reaction: ATP + N6,N6-dimethyladenosine = ADP + H+ + N6,N6-dimethyl-AMP
child of: GO:0019206 nucleoside kinase activity
Xref: Rhea:86215 (not yet public)

3)
N6-isopentenyladenosine kinase activity
Catalysis of the reaction: ATP + N6-(dimethylallyl)adenosine = ADP + H+ + N6-(dimethylallyl)adenosine 5'-phosphate
child of: GO:0019206 nucleoside kinase activity
Xref: Rhea:86219 (not yet public)

4)
N6,N6-dimethyl-AMP deaminase activity
Catalysis of the reaction: H2O + H+ + N6,N6-dimethyl-AMP = IMP + dimethylamine 
child of GO:0019239 deaminase activity
Xref: Rhea:86223 (not yet public)

5)
N6-isopentenyl-AMP deaminase activity
Catalysis of the reaction: H2O + H+ + N6-(dimethylallyl)adenosine 5'-phosphate = IMP + dimethylallylamine
child of GO:0019239 deaminase activity
Rhea:86227 (not yet public)

RX PubMed=40840445; DOI=10.1016/j.cell.2025.07.041
